emails.subject: Payment Inquiry - Invoice #7891
emails.body_text:
Dear Taylor,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm writing to follow up on Invoice #7891 in the amount of $12,450.00 dated March 15, 2026. As of today, our records do not show receipt of this payment.

Could you please check the status on your end and confirm whether payment has been issued? If it has been sent, could you provide the trace number or proof of payment so we can follow up with our bank?

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
James Hartley
Accounts Receivable Manager
Global Office Supply Inc.
james.hartley@globalofficesupply.com
(860) 555-0142

emails.subject: Urgent: Missing Payment - Invoice #7892
emails.body_text:
Dear Taylor,

I am following up regarding Invoice #7892 for $8,750.00, dated March 18, 2026. This was flagged as an emergency order, and we expected payment within the standard 15-day terms.

It has now been over two weeks and we have not received the funds. Can you please look into this and let us know the payment status?

Thank you,
James Hartley
Accounts Receivable Manager
Global Office Supply Inc.

emails.subject: Payment Status Check - Invoice #7893
emails.body_text:
Hi Taylor,

I wanted to check on the status of Invoice #7893 for $3,200.00 (March freight services). Our standard terms are Net 30, but I wanted to confirm the payment is in process on your side.

No rush - just doing our monthly reconciliation.

Thanks,
Sandra Mitchell
Billing Coordinator
Premium Logistics Corp.
sandra.mitchell@premiumlogistics.com
(203) 555-0198

emails.subject: Payment Confirmation Needed - Invoice #7895
emails.body_text:
Hi Taylor,

Our accounting team is asking for confirmation on Invoice #7895 ($15,800.00 for Q1 warehousing). Your AP department mentioned the payment was issued, but we haven't seen the funds hit our account yet.

If available, could you send over the payment confirmation or clearing documentation? That would help us sort this out on our end.

Thank you,
Sandra Mitchell
Billing Coordinator
Premium Logistics Corp.

emails.subject: Weekly AP Processing Report
emails.body_text:
Hi Taylor,

Attached is this week's AP processing summary. Please review the outstanding vendor inquiries queue and follow up as needed. Vendor response SLA is 2 business days.

Thanks,
Rachel

emails.subject: Re: Weekly AP Processing Report
emails.body_text:
Thanks Rachel, will work through the queue today and Monday.

- Taylor
